task_completion.visual_evidence: The StudioTax 2024 application window is visible and active on the screen.

task_completion.description: Access Megan Chen's tax documents from the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or document viewer (e.g., PDF reader) is open, showing files located in the C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\ directory.

task_completion.description: Create a new tax return for Megan Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The StudioTax interface displays 'Megan Chen' in the personal information section, the active return tab, or the taxpayer profile.

task_completion.description: Enter data from the tax documents into the StudioTax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax forms, schedules, or slips (e.g., T1 General, T4) are visible and populated with numerical data, indicating the return is being actively completed.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return as 'megan_chen.24t' in the specified Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box in StudioTax or a File Explorer window showing the file 'megan_chen.24t' successfully saved in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\ directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active navigation, typing, or form-filling within the StudioTax 2024 application window, rather than terminal commands creating or modifying the file.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual tax software rather than a text editor or mock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface being interacted with is clearly StudioTax 2024, with its characteristic menus, tax forms, and layout.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The StudioTax 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is visible in the trajectory, confirming the file was generated by the application and not simply moved or copied from a hidden directory.
